source_name: Code4rena Ethena Labs Findings and Analysis Report (2024-11) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
source_report_section: Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues / QA
issue_title: The _beforeTokenTransfer() function does not verify whether addresses are whitelisted when WHITELIST_ENABLED is set.
summary: As noted in line 191, the function only checks if the address to is not blacklisted. Consequently, unwhitelisted users can still receive UStb when WHITELIST_ENABLED is active. This issue appears in several locations.
root_cause: QA/low-risk implementation weakness described in the final C4 low/non-critical report.
why_not_medium_or_high: the issue appears in the final report low/non-critical or QA section and does not by itself prove a permissionless high-impact exploit
operational_risk: As noted in line 191, the function only checks if the address to is not blacklisted. Consequently, unwhitelisted users can still receive UStb when WHITELIST_ENABLED is active. This issue appears in several locations.
when_it_could_escalate: if combined with permissionless access or large-value state transitions
if the affected path becomes critical to mint/redeem/withdrawal solvency or availability
